tasks.label: Test: Linux (macOS host)
tasks.detail: Runs tests on Linux through the macOS container CLI.
tasks.command: container run --rm -it --cpus 8 --memory 8G --volume "${workspaceFolder}:/workspace" --volume swiftrpc-build:/build --workdir /workspace docker.io/library/swift:6.2 swift test --scratch-path /build --jobs 4 --verbose
